item.body: Night 3 built the fixture runner (scripts/run-pipeline-on-fixture.mjs) and verified R2 upload + pipeline trigger for sample-3q.mp4, sample-5q.mkv, and sample-corrupt.mkv. But task EXECUTION requires pnpm trigger:dev running. Sam must: 1. pnpm dev (port 3001) 2. pnpm trigger:dev (separate terminal) 3. node scripts/run-pipeline-on-fixture.mjs fixtures/sample-3q.mp4 4. node scripts/run-pipeline-on-fixture.mjs fixtures/sample-5q.mkv 5. Check reports/night3-fixture-*-output.json for segmentation question counts. See reports/night3-pipeline-acceptance.md for full acceptance criteria.

Night 3 built the SM-2 backend: /api/review/next and /api/review/[questionId]/grade. Claude Design team needs to wire these into the new UI. The APIs are typed and documented in docs/api.md. ReviewState schema is in prisma/schema.prisma.

blocker.body: The 10 `FeedbackItem.key` values in `.claude/skills/cpa-grading/SKILL.md` are placeholders (knowledgeAccuracy, reasoningChain, ...). Lock the real 10 — wording, axis assignment (accounting vs consulting), and weights — and the grading schema + Zod validator will be updated to match in a single commit.
blocker.note: Night 2: Task 7 shipped with placeholder keys. Each graded FeedbackItem carries precision:"provisional". When Sam locks the real keys, run `pnpm prisma migrate dev` to add a migration if the JSON shape changes, then update `FeedbackPayload` enum in `src/lib/schemas/feedback.ts`.

blocker.body: Task 4 Signal C (pHash template matching) needs reference frames for Becker's "question view" vs "feedback view". Night 2 ships a 2-signal pipeline (scene detection + transcript cues). pHash is wired as a stub returning "unknown" classification until Sam drops reference frames under fixtures/templates/question.jpg and fixtures/templates/feedback.jpg.

`fixtures/ground-truth.json` contains TENTATIVE, equally-spaced question boundaries for `sample-3q` and `sample-5q`. Sam: please spot-check the fixtures, update the `startSec`/`endSec` values to reflect real transitions, and flip `flag` from "GUESS" to "VERIFIED". Without this, segmentation acceptance tests run with placeholder ground truth and assert only "question count within +/- 1". Night 2 ships Task 4 with this disclaimer baked into reports/task4-accuracy.md.
Sam pushed all Night 1 commits to origin/main manually. Push allow-rule is in place for Night 2.
Sam filled in .env with real DATABASE_URL, R2_*, TRIGGER_PROJECT_ID, TRIGGER_SECRET_KEY. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY remains empty (OAuth-only dev).
yt-dlp installed via winget on 2026-04-17 01:17. Section 11 fixtures downloaded (3 Becker videos + 1 synthetic corrupt sample).

log.entry: Overnight build started. Initial blockers seeded by the playbook.
Night 1 BUILD-COMPLETE. 26 tests passing, e2e green, ~20 commits pushed by Sam.
Night 2 started. Resolved push-main + env-secrets blockers. Beginning Phase A smoke test.

Night 3 started. Phase A: fixed trigger.config.ts, added port-reclaim scripts, all 5 e2e pass. Phase B: fixture runner built, R2 uploads verified for all fixtures; task execution pending trigger:dev. Continuing Phase C (SM-2 + Anki).
